title: Indulgent Saudi-Arabian Wagyu Burger
description: A peppery, snappy, indulgent dish featuring Wagyu beef, nuka-pickle, and Mediterranean-friendly flavors. Perfect for a special occasion or a gourmet dinner.
instructions: Grill Wagyu beef patties to medium-rare, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, toast brioche buns on the grill.
Spread Nuka-Pickle on the bottom bun.
Add a Wagyu beef patty, followed by a slice of Cheddar cheese.
Drizzle with Mediterranean Olive Oil and sprinkle with Garlic Powder, Smoked Paprika, Salt, and Black Pepper.
Add a handful of Fresh Cilantro on top.
Place the top bun on and serve immediately.
Serve with additional Nuka-Pickle on the side, if desired.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
